pericopes.title: Hesoh athoh nunga Paul in Pathen athangvahna phabep.
Houbung mite kithahsem a lunghei jeh-a Paul kipa
Pathen na atohna chunga Paul kihonna
Solchah khat ahijeh-a Paul hesoh gentheina ho
Paul’in themgao thilmua mu anei phabep chule thu kiphongdoh phabep
Corinth khoa Houbung mite dia Paul lunggim
Achaina a gihsalna phabep leh lemna phabep

chapters.text: Pathen lungcham tah a Jesu Christa solchah a pang Paul le sopi Timothy’n Corinth a um Pathen Houbungte chule Achaia gam sunga um mithengte jouse henga.
i-Pau Pathen le Pakai Jesu Christa a konin lungsetna le lungmonna chun umpiuvin.
Pakai Jesu Christa Pa Pathen vahchoiyin umhen. Ama lungsetna ho Pale lungmonna jouse Pathen ahi.
Keihon Pathena kona lungmonna kaneiyu, hiche lungmonna chu hesoh gentheiya umteho kalungmonsah theina dingun, hesoh gentheina lah-a jong aman eilungmonsah jing jiuve.
Christa thohgimna chengse kadimset bangun, Christa vangin lungmonna kadimset jingui.

Ahin keihon hesoh genthei kathoh-u aumle, hichu nangho lungmonna dingle huhhinga naumna dingu ahi; lungmonga kaumu jongle, hichu nangho lungmonna ding ahi; hichun keiho thohji hotoh kithakhat thoh hattoh thoa hesoh genthei thoh chun thil holdoh aneijin a hi;
chule nanghon hesoh genthei thohna lama chan naneiyu banga, lungmonna lama jong chan naneiyu chu kahen, kakineppi nau adet jinge.

Sopite, Asia gama kachunguva hesoh genthei chua chu nahet lou dingu kanompoi, chutobang nasatah a thohjou hoi hilou kathauvin ajo kalvalin eidelpha jengu ahin, hing dinga jong kakihol louvu ahitan ahi.
Ahin keihon kalung sung un, keiho le keihoa ki tahsan louva athiho kaithouva Pathen chu katahsan johna dingun, kathina dingu ahung lhunge, katiu ahitai.
Ama chun chutobanga len thina a kona chu eihuhdoh u ahi, chujongle eihuhdoh dingu ahi; Ama chun tuajong eihuhdoh dingu ahinalaiye tia Amaa chu kakinepnau phutdet kahiuve.
Mi tamtah vanga lungsetna thilpeh eikipeh jeh uva hi mi tamtah-in keiho chung changa athangvah theina dinga, nangho jong nataonauva eikithopia nahiuve.

Ijeh-inem itile kakisonnau chu hiche hi ahi, kalung sunguva ase apha hetnan eihettohsah-u chu, vannoi mite hengah chule atamjo cheh-in nangho ding lamah, tahsaphe lam chihna hilouva, Pathen lungset vanga Pathen thennale kitahna a kanachon jingu ahi.
Nanghon sim jong nasimuve het jong nahetchen chetsau ahi, chule akhon ni geiyin heuvinate tin kakinem e, hiche thu tailou chu keihon nangho henga thu dang ima kasun pouve.
Nanghon keiho neihetphot thimu banga chu, Pakai Jesu nikho nileh nangho kisonna ding keiho kahiu banga, nangho jong keiho kisonna ding nahiuve.
Chule kalung kihola aniveina phatchomna nanei theina dinguva nangho henga hung masaleng kati ahi;
chule nangho kom hinhopang lang nanghoa konin Macedonia chepaiying, Macedonia a konin nangho henga hunging, chule nanghon Judah gam lama neithahleu chun kati.
Hijeh a chu chutia lung kaput chu lungphelen kalah ham? Ahiloule kalunggot chengse hi tahsaphe dungjuiya kahile kahi, kahi loule kahi lou, tia kahim?
Ahinla Pathen tahsan umtah ahi, nangho ding lama kathu u hi ahile ahi, ahiloule ahilou, ahipoi.
Ajeh chu iham itile nalah uva keihon, keima tah le Silvanus chule Timothy’n, kalhangsap leu Pathen Chapa Jesu Christa a chun ahi, chule ahipoi aumpoi; Amaa chun ahi aumbouve.
Ajeh chu Pathen thutep ijat hijeng jongle Ama a chu ahi chu uma ahi; hijeh a chu keihoa kona Pathen loupina dinga, Ama vanga Amen hijing ahi.
Chule Christa a nangho toh eiphutdoh chule thao einua chu Pathen ahi.
Ama chun namdet einam khum u ahi, chule ilung sunguva khamgahna a banga Lhagao Theng akhum ahi.
Nangho kalungset jeh-aba tu geiya Corinth a hung louva kahitai, kahinna chunga hiche thua hi Pathen ahetoh-a kanei ahi.
Keiho nangho tahsanna chunga vaipoa kahipouve, nakipanau chu hujoa kahibovui. Ijeh-inem itile nangho tahsana nadingdet nauve.
Ahin keiman keima changtuma dinga hitia hi kangaito ahitai, tukal in lungphamon nahenguva hung taponge.
Ajeh chu keiman nangho lung phatmo sahleng, kalung phatmosah te tailou chu keima eikipasah dinga koiham?
Keima kipana a nangho kipah unate ti kagingchan, eikipasah dingho chengse chun kahung teng eilung phatmo sah khante katia, hiche thu chu kahinsut ahitai.
Chule nalung phatmo nading uva hilouvin, keiman nangho kangailut jeu hi nahet dohna dinguva, lung hesoh, lungkham, chule mitlhi tamtah puma hiche thu mama chu kahinsut ahi.
Ahinla lungphat mosah khattou auma ahile keima chang eilung phat mosah ahipoi, kahabol khoh behseh louna dinga, nangho kimkhat jong alungphat mosah ahi.
Mi atamjoa kona chutobang min talen amuji, hichu ama dinga phaset ahi.
Chuti ahi jeh chun nanghon ngaidam un lungmonsah joleu chun aphai; ajole chutobang mi chu lungphatmo behseh-in vallhum get’inte.
Hijeh a chu nahenguva katao ahi, nanghon Ama chu nangailut nau kichet sah-un.
Hijeh a chu nangho imalam jousea thungai nahiule, nahi louvu kiphotnaa kahinsut ahi.
Ahin nanghon nangaidamu chu keiman jong kangaidam a ahile, kangaidam chu Christa maikoh-a nangho jala kangaidam ahi;
hichu satan in ichunguva machalna thei agomkom atokhah louna ding ahi; ajeh chu eihon ama doha lungthim ihaiyu ahipoi.
Christa Kipana Thupha hila Troas a kahunga, chule Pakaiya keima dinga kot khat akihon chun,
kasopi Titus chu kamudoh lou jeh-in lung olna kaneipon ahi; ahin amahoa konin kakilhadoh-in Macedonia gam lama kachetan ahi.
Ahin Pathen thangvah-in um jinghen, Aman aimatih chanin keiho Christa galjona-in eipuile jingui, chule keiho eimangun Ama hetna gimnam chu muntinah aphongjal len ahi.
Huhhinga umhole amangthah ho dinga Pathen lama Christa gimnamtui kahiuve;
Loi khat dinga thina a kona thina gimnam kahiuvin, loi khatte dingin hinna a kona hinna gimnam kahiuve, chucheng dinga lhinga koiham?

Mi tamtah-in Pathen thu hi miho duha bola sum donnan amangui, keiho vangin chutobang chun kamang pouve; kitah tah-a kaseiyuva Pathen thupeh bang banga kaseiyuva, Christa chu Pathen mitmua thu kaseijiu ahibouve.
Keiho kiseipha pan kit kahiuvem? Ahiloule nangho henga ahim, nanghoa kon ahima, seiphatna lekha mi abang bangho banga ngaiya kahiuvem?
Nanghotah chu kalekhau nahiuve, kalung sunguva kisun, mi jousen asima ahetsoh ahi;
nangho chu Christa lekha thot nahiuve, keiho lhacha natoh-a kona lekha tin akilange; lekhatwiya kisun hilouva, Pathen hing Lhagaova joh ahi; songphenga hilouva, tahsa hing phengajoh ahi.
Chule Christa vanga Pathen lama imalam jousea thu ngai nahiule, nahi, hitobang tahsan hi kaneiyu ahi.
Keihoa kona ahi, ti dingin keiho chang kabulhing joupouve, kabulhinnau hi Pathena kon ahibouve.
Amatah-in kitepna thah lha-chalea eibulhin sah-u ahi; lekha jema hilouvin lhagao kitepna lhacha joh ahi. Lekha jem chun athatjin; lhagao vang chun ahinsahji ahi.
Ahin thina lhacha panna songa ki-khena kisun jengbon, chubang tah chun aloupin, Israel chatehon Mose mai vah-pempum chu avechang thei tapouvin ahi; hiche vah chu kem suhsuh ahi;
achutile Lhagao lhacha a panna chu havahjo cheh lou dingham?
Ijeh-inem itile themmo channa lhacha bon aloupia ahile, chon-phatna lhacha chu nasajo cheh-a loupia ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile loupi kisa a chu loupina nasajoh chun akhokhel tah jeh chun hichea hin loupina anei tapon ahi.
Amang theiya bon chutia aloupia ahile, imatih chana umjing ding chu gamchenga loupijo cheh ahi.
Hitobang chu kinepna kanei jeh uva hi kahattah-a thu kaseijiu ahi.
Chule akem suhsuh chu avet lhumkei louna ding-uva pon amaiya kikhua Mose tobang chu kahipouve;

ahinla amaho chu alungu atahjo chehtan ahi; ajeh chu lulai gei jong hin thutep lui chu asimlai chanun chuche pon kikhu chu aum nalai jingjeng e. Christa a kisumanga ahi chu amaho dinga kilang louva ahi.
Ahin tuni gei hin Mose lekhabu asimlai chanun alunguva chuche pon kikhu chu a um jinge.
Ahivangin Pakai heng lama akiheijousea apon kikhu chu kila mangji ahi.
Tun Pakai chu Lhagao ahi; ahin Pakai Lhagao umna chan chu chamlhatna ahi.
Eiho chengse vang maikhu louva phatvet sunga kivea banga Pakai loupina chu ivet jinguva Pakai Lhagaova kona loupinaa kona loupina lima kikhela ihiuve.
Hiche jeh a chu keihon lungsetna kachan va hiche lhacha a panna kaneiyu hi, keiho kalhadah hihhelui;

ahin, jachatna thil kisei chengse kapai lhauvin duha lungthimin kachon pouve, chule Pathen thu chu mi lhep lhahnan kamang pouve; ahin thutah chu kaphongjal un Pathen mitmua amitakip se le pha hetna henga kaum chanu photchenna musah kahiuve.
Chule ka-Kipana Thupha jong hi maikhu akikhua ahile, amangthah ho dinga maikhu kikhua ahi;
hicheho sunga chu hiche vannoi pathen in atahsan louho lungmit asuhchot ahi; hiche Pathen lima um Christa loupina Kipana Thupha chun amaho chu asalvah louna dinga ahi.
Ajeh chu keihon keimaho hilouva Christa Jesu chu Pakai ahi, tia chule keiho Jesu jala nangho soh kahiu chu kalhangsap leu ahibouve.
Ijeh-inem itile, “Muthim lah a kona vah hung vahdoh ding ahi,” tia Pathen in asei ahin, Jesu Christa maiya Pathen loupi hetna chu avahdohna dinga, Ama chun kalungu asalvah ahi.
Ahivangin keihon leibela hiche gou kachin u hi thilbol theina chungnung tah chu keihoa kon hilouva, Pathena konjoh ahina dinga ahi;
hoima lam jousea neh-chinton kaum un, ahinla kisudong in kaum pouve; lungdong in kaum un, ahinla ka-lunglha pouve;
delmang in kaum un, ahi-vangin dalhah-in kaum pouve; eikivolhu-vin, ahivangin suhset-helin kaumpouve.
Kavalena chanuva katiuva Jesu hinna chu akiphon theinan, katiuvah Jesu thina chu kapole jingui.
Ijeh-inem itile keiho ahing cheng hi katahsau thi theiya hi Jesu hinna akiphondoh theina dinga, Jesu jala athi dinga pehdoh jinga um kahiuve.
Chutia chu keihoa thinan na atoh ahin, nanghoa hinnan atoh ahi.
Ahivangin katahsan jeh a thu kasei ahi, tia kisun banga chu tahsanna lhagao chu neiya, keihon jong katahsan jeh-uva thu kaseiyu ahi.
Pakai Jesu kaithouva chun keiho jong Jesu toh kigola eikaithou dingu, chule nangho toh a anga eidinsah dingu ahi chu kaheuve.
Lungsetna aha-pun a Pathen choiatna a mi tamtah thangvahna a aletset nadinga, imajouse nangho jala kibol ahi.
Hijeh chun kalhadah hih he lui; ahin kami ponung u akem jing jeng vangin, kami sungnung u aniseh-in athah cheh athah chehjon ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile chomkhat jengcha dinga kathohjiu hesoh gentheina jangkhai hin tonsot kemlou loupina chu hasema eisempeh be jing jengu ahi;
muthei thil kat louvin mulou thil chu kakatjove; muthei thil chu chomcha khat dinga ahin. mulou thil vang chu tonsot’a dinga ahi.
Hiche pon-in tobang kaleiset in uhi kiphelha jongle, khut’a sahlou tonsot in Pathena kona kisa indet chu vanah kaneiye, ti kaheuve.
Keiho hiche sunga peng penga vana kona kachenna dingu in chu athoa kivon ding ngai tun tuna um kahiuve.
Chuchea athoa kakivon tengule, sagoh keiva kaum lou dingu ahi.

Kapen penjiu hi hiche pon ina kachenuva pohgih kapoh jehjiuva penga kahiuve. Hiche pon beiya kaum nom hih uva, hinna chun thi theina hi avallhuma pon athoa kakisil uva kakivon theina dinguva, kapenjiu ahi.
Chule chuche dinga eigoa chu Pathen ahi; khamgahna a Lhagao eipeuva chu ahi.
Hijeh-a chu lungngam a kaum jingu ahi chule hiche tahsa ina kachen laiseuva hi, Pakaiya kona gamla chenga kahi, ti kaheuve.
ajeh chu keiho tahsan vanga chona kahiuve, polam mu theiya chon kahipouve;
lungngam a kaum u ahi, tahsa a um louva Pakai koma um kanom jouve.
Hijeh-a chu inah umu jongleng, umhih jongu leng, kadoiyu chu Ama lunglhaina a um kahatup tenu ahi.
Mitinin tahsa a athilbol apha hile, ase hile, athilbol dungjui cheh a atohman asan cheh theina dinga, eiho ibonchauva Christa thupi tanna anga chu ikilah cheh dingu ahi.
Hijeh-a chu Pakai kichatje kahet jeh-uva miho kajolleu ahi; ahivangin Pathen anga kilang jingin kaum nauve; chule nangho sele pha hetna a jong kakilang jingui, tin kakinem ui.
Nangho henga keiho kichang vahchoi kit kahiuvem, chuti ahipoi; lungthim thua hilouva kamsung lama kisongte chu nadonbut theina dinguva, keiho lama kisonna naneina dinguva lungthim kapehjoh nahibovui.
Kangolu le Pathena ding kahiuvin, kachih theiyu le nanghoa kahiuve.
Christa ngailutna chun kacham louva eisolu ahi; hiti hin kagelui, mi jouse thi khela khat athia ahile, mi jouse chu athia ahitai;
chule ahingho chu amaho dinga hing hitalouva, athi khel uva thia thoukit-Pa dingjoh-a hing ahi theina dinguva, mi jouse thi khela thia ahi.
Chuti ahi jeh chun tukala lhah-in tahsa lam dol a koima kahe tapouve; chuti chu ahin masangin Christa chu tahsa lam dolin he jongu leng, tua kalin hetapou vinge.
Hijeh chun koi hile Christa a um chu akisemthah ahi; alui chengse chu amanggama ahitai; veuvin, athah ahitai.
Ahivangin Christa vanga ama le eiho eisuchama Pathen in chuche kichamna thu lhachalea chu eipansah-u ahin; hiche Pathena kona chu hiti ima jouse hungkon ahi;
hiche kichamna thu chu Christa a Pathen uma vannoi leiset mite themmona a sunlouva Amatoh kichamna aboljoh ahi; chule chuche kichamna thu chu keiho eipehdoh-u ahi.
Hiche jeh-a chu Pathen in keiho lengpalaiya eipansah uva keiho a kona chamna athum ahin, keiho Christa dinga palai kahiuve; Christa dinga kathumnau hiche ahi, Pathen toh kichamun.
Ama a chu Pathen chonphatna ichan theina dinguva, chonset helouhel-Pa chu eiho khela chonsea asem ahitai.
Chule Christa toh natong khoma akithopia kahiuvin, Pathen lungsetna chu phatchomna beiya mua nahi louna dinguva kajolu nahiuve;
ijeh-inem itile Aman hitin ati, “Keiman lah phatchan nataona kasange; Chule huhhing nikho nin nangma kahun ahi.” Veuvin, tu hi lahphat tah ahi; veuvin, tu hi huhhing phat ahi.
Hiche lhachalea kapannau hi nolna aum louna dingin, keihon ilam ilam thu hile kipal lhuhna ding kaumsah pouvin ahi.
Ahin imalam jousea Pathen lhacha kahiu hi, hatah-a lungdehat’in, hesoh gentheina chengin, lhasama um lhoiyin, setto lungkhamna chengin,
kijepna chengin, songkula kihen lhoiyin, thunoh lungjinna chengin, thohgimna chengin, ihmulouva um lhoiyin, an ngola um lhoiyin,
thenin, hetna-in, thohhat sot’in, hepina neiyin, Lhagao Thengin, alhem hilouhel ngailutna-in,
thutah thun, Pathen thahat’in, jet le veiya chondihna galvon kivonin,
gunchena le jalouna-in, seiset le seiphat chanin, aphot chenna kavetsah jingui; mi lhemlha ho kabangun ahinla kitahtah kahiuvin;
hetkham louto kabangun ahinla minchetah kahiuve; athikon kabangun, ahinla veuvin, kahing nauve; engbolin kaumun, ahinla eikithat pouve;
lunghemtah kabangun, ahinla kipah thanom jing kahiuve; vaichatah kabangun ahinla tamtah kahaosah tauve; imacha neilouhel kabangun, ahinla imajouse kanei kimui.
Vo Corinth miteho, nangho dingin kakamu akan kalungu akihong lene.
Nangho keihoa nehchintoa uma nahipouve, nangho kichang lunggela nehchintoa naumu ahibouve.
Chuti chu ahin kapeh bang neipeh theina dingun @9(chate jah-a sei banga kasei ahi)@7 nangho jong kihong lenun.
Atahsan louho toh kojon khat pochu hi hih-un; chonphat le chonset akikopna ipi umam? Muthim le khovah akikhatna ipi umam?
Belial le Christa akitona ipi umam? Ahilou le atahsan in atahsan lou toh ipi chan anei khomem?

Chule Pathen intheng le milimho kilolna ipi umam? Ijeh-inem itile eiho Pathen hing intheng ihiuve; chutichun Pathenin jong ati, “Keima amaho lah-a kachena chule kavale ding ahi; Chule Keima amaho Pathen kahi ding, Amaho kamite hiding,” tin.
Chuti ahi jeh chun Pakai chun ati, “Nangho amaho lah-a kon chun hung potdoh-un, Chule achomin umun; Chule thilboh tongkha hihhel un; Chule keiman nangho kalah lut ding nahiuve.
Chule keima napau hing ting, Chule nangho Kachapate le Kachanute nahi dingu ahi,” tia hatchung nung Pakai chun asei ahi.
Hijeh chun, sopi ngaite, thutep hicheng chu ineiyu ahi jeh chun hungun, lhagao le tahsa kisuhbohna jousea konin kisuthengu hitin, Pathen gingin thenna a chamkim in umuhite.
Nalung sunguva mun neipeuvin; keihon koimacha alam louvin kabol pouve, koima kasuse pouve, koima dohan kalhemlha pouve.
Nangho themmo sahna dinga hiche hi kasei ahipoi; ithi le thisap ihin le hingsap dingin kalungin kavop jinguve, tia masanga kaseisa ahitai.
Nangho lama kahakat lheh jenge chule kakisonna jong anasai; chuti chun kahesohna jousea lungmonna kadimset’in chule kipana-in kaletset jingin ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile Macedonia gama kahungu jong chun tahsa a choldona neilou kahiuve; hoima lam jousea hesoh genthei toh jinga um jing jeng kahiu ahi; polama eidouva, lung sunga kichat kanei jing jengjiu ahi.
Ahinla mi kisunemte lungmonsah Pathen in Titus hunglhun vang chun eilungmonsah tauve;

chule ama hung vang jenggoh jong hilouvin, aman nanghoa lungmonna anei hiche lungmonna chun eilungmonsah tauvin ahi, nanghon neingaichat jeu, neilhaset piu, kei dinga nagunchu jeu, thu ahung seiyin ahile, hichea chun hatah-in kakipah kathanom lheh jengtan ahi.
Ajeh chu keiman kahin lekhathot chun nangho kasuh lunghem jeng vangun kakisihpoi; kana-kisih jeng vangin @9(kalekha thot chun nalunghem sah lheh jengun ahi; ahin hichu chomcha khat dinga bou ahi)@7.

keima tun kakipah kathanome, nangho suhlunghema naum jeh-u chu hilouvin, lungheina neina a kisulunghem nahiu jeh chu ahi. Ijeh ham itile, nanghon keihoa hakamna imacha nanei louhelna dinguva, Pathen lam dola kisulunghema nahiu ahi.
Ajeh chu Pathen lam dola lunghem chun huhhinga umna asoji ahi; hichun kisihna asojipoi; vannoi leiset lam dola lunghem chun thina asojin ahi.

Ajeh chu, vetau, Pathen lunglamdola lunghema chun nanghoa itobanga kihatup chehna asodoh hitam! Hichu nakisuh thengna, lungsouna, kichatna, ngaichatna, gunchuna, chule kiphulahna, hichenga chun nakhantousah lheh jengun ahi. Hiche thua chu imalam jousea thengsoh nahiu chu photchenna a naumsah-u ahitai.

Hiche nahenguva kahinsut jeng vang chun alam louva bolpa jeh-a kahinsut ahipoi, alam louva kibolpa jeh-a jong kahinsut ahidehpoi, kachunga nagunchu jeu chu Pathen mitmua nahenguva akiphondohna dinga, kahinsut joh ahibouve.
Hijeh chun kalung mongtauve. Chule chuche kalung monnau chunga chun Titus kipana a kakihapa cheh jengun ahi; nanghon nabonchauva alung nakidosah jeh-u chun.
Ajeh chu ama komah nanghoa kakisonna ima umta jeng jongle jachatnan kanei tapoi, ahin nangho henga kathu seijouseu thutah mong ahi.
Chule nangho thua nungtah a chule kichatah a kithing thinga ama nanalem jengu chu ageldohji le nangho nakhotou anasacheh cheh jengtan ahi.
Nangho thu dola ijakaiya kiholna kanei hi kakipah kathanom e.
Sopiteho, Macedonia a Houbungho kipea Pathen lungset thu nangho kahetsah nahiuve.
Ajeh chu hesoh genthei umtah lhepna nasatah lah jenga jong akipanau adimin avaichat thuh lheh jeng vangun, athilphal uva kon aletset jengtan ahi.
Keiman kahettoh sah-a Kasei ahi, amahon athautoh kithuh-in athauvin ajokalval in jong amaho chamin mithengte phattheina dinga.
Lhacha kin bolna a eipanhu na dingun, kahenguva thu alauvin atoh jengun ahi.
Chule hichu kaginchat bangu hilouvin, Pathen lunglam in amahoa Pakaiyah ape masauvin, chuin keiho eipeuvin ahi.
Chuti chun Titus-in masanga abol pat banga chu tuajong chuche lungsetna chu nangho lah-a abulhitsoh nadingin katil til jiuvin ahi.
Amavang tahsan le seidoh chule hetna le gunchuna jouse toh thoa keiho neingailut nau nanei letset banguva chu, hiche lungsetna jong hi nanei letsetna dingu gel un.
Hiche hi thupeh bangtah-a kasei hilouvin, midangho kihalbolna a kona nanghon ngailutna tahbeh naneiyu chu patepna a kasei ahibouve.
Ajeh chu Ama vaichat vanga nangho nahaodoh theina dinguva, ahaonasa a nangho jala vaicha jenga, hiche Pakai Jesu Christa lungset chu nanghon naheuve.
Hiche thudola chu lungthim kapehbou nahiuve; chuti chu nangho dinga apha ahi; kum khat masanga bolpan masa nangho nahiuve, nabol pat jenggoh-u hilouva bol jong nabolphat nomu ahi.
Ahin bol ding nalung got bangu chun than ajochan in bulhit sohkeiya aum theinan, tun jong bol bulhing un.
Ajeh chu lunggot masah auma ahile, aneiya chu anei dungjuiya chule aneilou chu aneilou dungjuiya kilajia ahi.
Midang dinga noma umna ahia nangho dinga hesoh a umna dinga ahipoi;
chamgola umna ding ahi, amaho nei letset chu nangho lhahsam bulhitna a ahung hi theina dinga; tua nangho nei letset hi amaho lhahsam bulhitna a chamgola umna dinga kitoh ahibouve;
hitia chu, “Atam lokhoma chu aval aum chomdehpoi, chule alhom lokhoma jong chu alhasampoi,” tia kisun bang chu ahi.
Ahin Titus lungsunga chutobanga lungluttah a nangho khotona neisah Pathen chu thangvah-in umhen.
Ajeh chu keiho tilkhouna ajop vang ahinai, ahinla amatah mong lungluttena ama lung cham a nangho henga hunga ahi.
Chule Kipana Thupha lama Houbung ho jouse lah-a akipachatna kithangsoh chu amatoh lhon dingin kahinsol thauve.
Chutijeng-goh chu ahipoi; Pakai loupina le kalung-gotjenjeu hi vetsahna a alhachalea kapanu hiche lungsetna thu lam dola hi kalhonpi le dinguva Houbung in agotsa mongu jong ahi.
Alhachalea kapanu hiche thilpeh letset thudola hi koiman eidem louna dinguva chingthei tah-a chona kahiuve;
Pakai mitmua jenga hilouva mihem mitmua jong thil ja umdol chu kangaitou ahi.
Chule keihon tamtah vei thil tamtah a agunchuje kaphottoh sau isopipau chu amahotoh kahinsol thau ahi, ahin tun nanghoa tahsan dettah anei jeh-in aha gunchu cheh jengtan ahi.
Titus thudol hi seile hen, ama hi nangho chungchanga kachan khompile katoh khompi ahi; chule sopi ni teni vang hi Houbungho solchah chule Christa loupina ahi lhone.
Chuti ahi jeh chun nangailut naule nangho sih-a kisonna kaneiyu hiche ni hi aphotchenna Houbungho angsunga amaho chu kivetsah-un.
Mithengte kinbol thudol vang nahenguva kahinsutbo angaipoi;

ijehinem itile nalunggot danu chu kahenai; hiche dol chu, kum khat ahitan Achaia kigosan aume, tia Macedonia mite anga nangho kapaopi ahi; chule hiche nagunchu nau chun mi tamtah achoh thouvin agunchu sahtan ahi.
Hiti lam thudola nangho kapaopinau chu ahomkeo ahilouna dinga, kasei banga chu kigosadema naumna dingun, tia sopiho phabep khat kahinsolu ahitai.
Achuti loule ajole Macedonia mi khattou kei lhonpi dingin hunghen, kigo louva naumu hungtoh tale, keiho cheng jenggoh hilouva, kineppitah nangho dinga jong jachat um ding ahi.

Hijeh a chu masanga pat nakitepna sau thilpeh kitoh chu acham louva lah hilouva, lhanlhaiya peh ahia gotsadema nakoina dinguva; aphat masanga nahenguva hung dinga sopiho chu tem angaiye, tia kageltoh ahi.
Ahivangin hiche thudola hin alhom tua chun alhom at ding, chule atam tua chun atam at ding ahi.
Lung phatmo pumpum le peh louva phamo, tia pe louvin, nalung got bangtah cheh-in peuvin; ijeh-inem itile lunglhai sela pea chu Pathenin angailui.
Chule imalam jousea imatih chana ijakaiya bulhing soh nahiuva natohpha tintang natoh theina dinguva, Pathenin lungsetna letset nangho napeh theiyu ahi.
Hiche thudol chu hiti hin akisune; “Aman athejalin, mivaichate atoi; Ama chonphat chu aimatih chana um jing ahi,” tin.
Chule muchi tua chu muchi pea chule anneh dinga changlhah pea chun nangho muchi peuvinatin punsah nante, chule nangho chonphat ga chu khantou sah nante.
Thil phal dinga imalam jousea haodoh-a nahitauvin, alhacha a keiho vangin Pathen vahchoiyin aume;
ajeh chu hiche phatna ding bol lhachalea panna vanga hi mithengte lhahsamna bulhinsah jenggoh hilouva, thangvahna tamtah a konna lama jong letset jenga ahitai.
Hiche lhacha kin kibola kon hin, nangho Christa Kipana Thupha thu noiya naum nomu naphonu le amaho le adangho jouse tona a nathilpeh phalu chun Pathen avahchoiyui.
amahotah jong nangho dingin Pathen henga atao ataovun, nachunguva Pathen lungset lentah chuh jeh chun nangai lheh jengui.
Athilpeh sei thei lou jehhin, Pathen thangvah-in umhen.
Keima, Paul, naumnauva lungnem chule naum lounauva hakat chun, Christa chonnem le nunnema keimatah-in katem nahiuve.
Ahi, keiho hi tahsa lam thua chon ahi, tia eingaito ho mi koi koiham chunga hakattah a chon ding dol ahi, tia kageltoh chu kimuto tengle, hiche hakat chu kamanchah louna dinga, nahenguva katao ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile keiho tahsa a chonle vang kahiuve, ahivangin tahsa lam thudolin gal kasat pouve;
ajeh chu kagal satnau manchah hi tahsa a ahipoi, ahin kulpi suhjalna dinga Pathen anga hattah ahi;
keihon, lungsuhtoa mi nei na chule Pathen lam hetna douna a kigel thil sangtahtah kasuhchim jiuva, lungthim ngaito jouse gal hinga kamat jiuva Christa thua kanunsah jiu ahi.
Chule nangho thua nanun bulhin tengule, thua nunglou ho phula dinga jong kigosa jing kahiuve.
Nanghon namaikoh uva um thil chu naveuve. Koi hile mi khattou ama Christaa kahi tia amachang kitahsana a um le, ama chun hiche hi ngaito kit hen, ama Christa a ahi bang chun keiho jong kahiuve.
Ajeh chu kathunei nau hi hatah-in song jongleng, nangho phetlhahna hilouva sahphatna dingjoh-a Pakaiyin eipeh-u ahin, kajachatpi lou dingu ahi.
Lekhahoa chun nangho tijatsah tobang hidange.
Ajeh chu alekhaho athu agihsan, hat jong ahat ngeiye, ahinla amunah atahsa ahatmon athusei taimo aume, atiuve.
Chutobang miho chun heuhen, keiho kaum lou tenguva lekha a thu banga chu kaumu jongle thilbola chutima chu kahiuve.

Ajeh iham itile amachang kivahchoi mi abang khattou hotoh kisimtha dingle kitekah ding kangampouve; amaho vang chu amaho le amaho akiteuvin, chule amaho le amaho akitekah jiuvin, imacha helou helin aumui.
Keiho vang eikitepeh kalvalun kisong pouvinge, Pathen in gamkol eichanu eitepeh bang banga bou kisong ding kahiuve, gamkol chun nangho jong nahomui.
Ajeh chu keiho, nangho hung phaloutoh kabah jeng vangun, eikitepeh kalavala kilhonsao kahipouve, ajeh chu Christa Kipana Thupha hillea, nangho kom geipeh jong kahung lhunu ahi;
eikitepeh kalvaluva midang tohnasa a kisonga kahipouve; natahsan u akhantou le kagamkol dungjuiyu hin nangho vangin hatah a kehlet cheh-in uminge, ti kakineme.
Nangho gam kalpeh geiya Kipana Thupha hi kaseiphongle theina dinguva, kakhut’uva dinga gotsa um thil dola hi mi gamkol sung kason louna dingo, katiu ahi.
Ahin khattou akisonga aumle, Pakaiyah kisong hen.
Ajeh chu ama kiseipha a chu hilouvin. Pakai seiphat chubou apha tia kisei ahi.
Kangolna themthema neina ngai themleu chun kalung ahi; ahin neina ngai themsam nauve.
Pathen tomlah a nachunguva katomlah ahi, nungah theng banga Christa khut’a kapeh theina dinguva, nangho inneipu khatseh Christa dinga katuhhol nahiuve.
Ahivangin gul chun alepthol doha a Eve alheplhah bang chun, Christa lama nalungput dihnau le nathennau chu ijemtin suchavai get’unate, ti kakichai.

Keihon athu kasei louvu Jesu achom dang khat thu ahung seiya auma, ahilou le nachankhah ngai louvu lhagao chomdang changa auma, ahilou le najop khah ngai louvu Kipana Thupha jop auma, ahile ama chu angai themleu chun aphai.
Ijeh-inem itile keiman kahei, chuche solchah pipui chungnung ho chu imalam jousea kaphah lelna imacha aumpoi.
Ahinla thuseiya kalhahchom vangin hetna lama chun kalhachompoi; hiche hi keihon imalam jousea miho jouse lah-a nangho henga kaphondoh-u ahi.
Ole, nangho choisanga naumna dinguva, keima kakisuhnema lo beiya nangho Pathen thupha kahilu hi achonsea kahim?
Nangho kinbolna dinga Houbung dangdang kachoma lo kasan ahi;

chule nangho koma kaum laisen kalhahsamna a um jongle, koima dinga gihsatna hilouhel kahi; ajeh chu Mecedonia a konin sopiho ahungun kangaichat chengse ahung subulhit tauve; chule imalam jousea nangho gihsatsah louna dinga kihongdoh jing kahin, kihongdoh jing ding kahi.
Christa thutah keiya umna chu Achaia gamkol sunga kakisonna chu koiman eikhahtan theiponte.
Ijeh ham? Nangho kangailut lou jehham? Pathen in ahenai.
Ahinla agomkom holteho chu akisonnau chu keiho tobangbang ahung hi theina dinguva, agomkom atokhah dingu chu kasuhhai theina dinga, kabol hi kaboljom jing ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile chutobang miho chu solchah lhem ahiuve; doha bola milhemlha natong ahiuve; amaho Christa solchahho lima kisema ahiuve.
Hichu thu kidang ahipoi, ajeh chu satan amatah jengin jong avah-a vah vantil mel aputji ahi.
Chuti chu ahin, alhacha hon chonphat lhacha ho mel aput chu thupi ahipoi; ahivanga athilbol dungjui cheh-a akichainiu hiding ahi.
Keiman kasei kit ahi, koiman lung-thim beiyin eingaito hihhen; ahin nanghon neingaitota jongleu chun, themkhat kakisonna theibeh dingin lungthimbei lah-in neilauvin.
Hicheng kasei hi Pakai thuseiya kasei hilouva, hiche kisonna hi gingcha a angol thusei banga kasei ahibouve.
Mi tamtah tahsaphe lama akison jeh-a kei jong kakison ding ahi.
Nangho achinga nahi jeh-uva lungthim beiya kipahtah-a nangaithemu ahi.
Nasohchan sah-uva jong, nabah gamuva jong, gal-hinga namanuva jong, ahamhoithoa jong, chule nangeipheu bengajong nangai themu ahi. Hiche nahsahmona dungjuiya chu kadoiyu ti kaseidoh ahi.
Ahivangin ilam ilam thua hile, midang ngamna a chun @9(mingol thuseiya kasei ahi)@7 kei jong kangame.
Amaho Hebrew mi hiuvam? Kei jong kahi. Amaho Israel mite hiuvam? Kei jong kahi. Amaho Abraham chilhah hiuvam? Kei jong kahi.
Amaho Christa lhacha hiuvam? @9(Mingol thuseiya kasei ahi)@7 Keima kaha hidehjoi, na hatohgim in, songkul lut tamin, teptena kalvala kivoh tamin, thina thei setto tamin;
ngavei Juda hoa konin som lia khat lhan eikijep in;
thumveina molin eikivon; khatvei songin eikisep’in, thumveina kongke kathoh, jan khat le sunkhat twi thuh laiya kaum;

kakholjin lena a tamtah vei, luipia setto, gucha michoma setto, kanam chanpitea kona setto, chidang namdang hoa kona setto, khopi sunga setto, gamthip dunga setto, twikhanglena setto, sopi lhemho lah a setto;
tohgim le hesoh gentheiyin, hah jinga ihmu louva um lhoiyin, gilkel dangchah thoh-in, an ngola um lhoiyin, khosih thoh pon sillouva umin, hicheng chu kaha hidehna ahi.
Hicheng vang chu chuti tante ahivungin apipenin Houbung chengse kangaitona hi niseh a eidelpha a ahi.
Koi hatmona kahatmopi lou umam? Koi kiselhuhna a katompi lou umam?
Kithang-at goa hileng kahatmona tamtah-a hi kikithang-at ding kahi.
Jou sei lou kahi, Pakai Jesu Christa Pa le Pathen tonsot nunnom a chun ahenai.
Damaseus a lengpa Aretas noiya gamvaipon keima man dingin Damascus miho khopi chu angasah jeng ahi;
ahivangin bangkot homa bomin kulpanga eikhailhauvin akhut’a konin kasoh chatan ahi.
Phatchomna hi hih jongle, kisonna kanei angaiye; ahinla mu nei chengse le Pakai kilah naho thubou seiyinge.
Keiman Christa a mi khat kahei kum somle kum li ahitai @9(tahsa puma ham kahepoi, tahsa puma hilouham kahepoi, Pathen in ahei)@7 van athumna geiyin lahtouvin aumin ahi.
Keiman hitobang mi chu kahei @9(tahsa pumaha, atahsa pum hilouham, hichu kahepoi, Pathen in ahei)@7.
Ama chu gam loupia lah touvin aumin, tho thei louhel paochengho agajai, hichu mihem dinga thodoh hoi dan hilouhel ahi.
Chutobang mi dinga chu kisong ding kahi; keima chang thua vang kahatmo kadoinaho tailouvah kisongponge.
Kison ding lung go jongleng lungthim beiya hiponge, keiman thutahbeh kasei ding ahi; min keima eimua chule kathu ajah a itobanga eingaitom hisanga chu chungnungjoa eingaito louna dinga, kakitim ahi.
Chule thil kilahho anatsat behseh jeh a chu kakichoisang behseh louna dingin, satan thangkou khat eichum dingin, kakichoisang louhelna dingin, kati chungah ling khat eikipen ahi.
Keiya kona achemangna dingin Pakai anga thumvei kataotan ahi.

Chutah chun aman, “Kalungsetna hi nangma dinga lhingset ahi; hatmona a kathahat kisuchamkimjia ahi.” ati. Hijeh a chu kahatmona a jong Christa thahat keiya achen theina dinga, kipahtah a kasonjoh ding ahi.
Chuti ahi jeh a chu Christa jala hatmona tincheng, suhlema umna, vaichatna, bolsetna, settona hichenga hi lunglhaiya um kahi; ajeh chu kahatmo komle kahatjin ahi.
Lungthim bei kanahi ahitai; nanghan lungthim bei lou theiyin neilha pouve; ajeh chu nangho choiat dingjoh kahin; keima imalim hihih jeng jongleng, chuche solchah pipuiho chu phalel a umlou kahi.
Tahtah a seiyin, solchah hi melchih naho jouse nangho lah a thohhat toh kithoa, melchihna tintang kibola, mu kidang dang chule thilbol theina a kiboldoh ahi.
Ahile Houbung dangho sanga noinungjoa naumnau ipi umam, keiman nangho gihsatsah louva kaum ti lou chu? Hiche kasuhkhel chu neina ngaidamun.

Veuvin, nangho henga hung kakigot hiche hi athum veina ahi; chule nangho gihsatsah lou ding kahi; ajeh chu keima nanghoa ima hola hilouvin nangho bou kahol ahi; ajeh chu anu le apa dinga chate hon sum akhol chu adol ahipoi, anu le apan bou chate dinga akhol ding dol ahi.
Chule keiman kipah tah-a nangho hinna dinga kakiman ding ahi chule mang jong kakiman jou ding ahi. Keiman nangho kangailutnau lentah ahile, eikingailu lhom a ham?
Ahoi hita le ahihi hitante, keiman nangho pohgihsa kapoh sahpoi; ahin lungthim thema doha a kamat nahiuve.
Nahenguva kahinsolte ho lah a khattou nangho doha bolna a kamanchah umam?
Titus chu keiman kajol jola chuche sopipa chutoh kahinsol ahi; ole Titus chun doha nabolnau umam? Keiho lhagao khat hilou kahiuvem? Kho khattah a chon hilou kahiuvem?

Tuchan geiya hi keiho kithenhon na a najah-uva thuseiya nei ngaito jingu ahi. Keiho Pathen maikoh-a Christa a thu seiya kahiuve. Chule, ngaitahte, imajouse hi nangho sadoh-a phattou sahna a kiseiya ahi.

Ajeh chu nakomu kahung lhun tengle ajole kamu nom bangin muhih khangting, chule nanghon jong neimu nom bangun neimu hih khauvin nate, ti kagingmoi; ijem itile nalah-uva, kibaotam, kithangset, lunghan, kilungdou kiseiset, kihoulhih, hamhoitho, thunoh lungjin, umkhante kati;

chutile ajole kahung kit tengle ka-Pathen in keima nangho angah eisunem khante; chule tu masanga chonsea, thenlouna, jon thanhoi, huh abolu kisih lou, chutobang miho tamtah jeh chun lungset lhaset kabol ding hikhante, kati ahi.
Nangho henga kahung tu chunga hi athum veina ahi. Aheton ni ahim, kama thu ijakai tun dinga um ding ahi.
Amasanga kaseisa ahi chule amasanga kasei ahi, aniveina a kaum pet’a banga chu, kaum lou tua jong, tu masanga chonse ho le adang dangho jouse henga, kahung kit tengle, khen nei lou ding kahi;
nanghon keima a Christa’n thu asei photchenna nahol jeh-u chun; Ama chu nangho ding lama hatmoa ahipoi, nanghoa hattah ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile hatmoa kona Ama thingpela akikhetbeh jeng vangin, Pathen thahat vangin ahing jinge. Ajeh chu keiho jong Ama a hatmoa kahiuve; ahinla Pathen thahat vanga nangho ding lama Amatoh hingkhom ding kahiuve.

Tahsana um nahiu nahi louvu nangho kikholun; photchenna dingin nangmaho kikholun. Ahiloule nanghon nangmaho chungchang thudol Jesu Christa nanghoa a um chu helou nahiuvem? Aphai tia lah hilou nahilou ngaluleh.
Ahinla keiho hi aphai tia lah hilou kahilou hi nanghon nahet dingu kakineme.

Ahivangin nanghon thil phalou nabol louna dingun, Pathen henga katao jiuve; hichu aphai tia lah kahiu chu kilahdohna dinga hilouva, nanghon thil ja um chu nabolna dinguva ahi, keiho aphai tia lah hiloutoh kabah jeng vangun.
Ajeh chu keiho thutah douna a ima bol theiya kahipouve, thutah dinga bolthei bou kahiuve.
Ijeh inem itile keiho kahatmova nangho nahat tengule kathanom jiuve, chule nachamkimna dingun jong, kataojiuve.

Hiche jeh chun asuse ding hilouvin houthu lama khantou sahna dinga Pakaiyin thuneina eipeh hi, kathunei bangtah a kahung tengle, kabol khoh louna ding lungthima kalung masanga hicheng hi kahinsut ahi.
Achaina keiyin, sopite, nangho kipah thanomun, chamkim keiyun, lungmongun, lungkhat hiuvin, kitoh delin umun; chutile ngailutle lungmon konna Pathen in naumpi dingu ahi.
Thengtah-a kibengchop cheh-in khat le khat kasalam un.
Mitheng jousen nasalamui.
Pakai Jesu Christa lungset, Pathen ngailut, chule Lhagao Theng kithopina chun nabonchauvin umpiuvin.
